negative_high.description: Textures with sharp, erratic patterns that convey negative high-energy emotions

negative_moderate.description: Textures with understated, muted qualities that convey negative moderate-energy emotions

negative_low.description: Textures with low contrast, faded qualities that convey negative low-energy emotions

neutral_high.description: Textures with balanced movement that convey neutral high-energy emotions

neutral_moderate.description: Textures with even, balanced qualities that convey neutral moderate-energy emotions

neutral_low.description: Textures with soft, subtle qualities that convey neutral low-energy emotions

positive_high.description: Textures with vibrant, dynamic qualities that convey positive high-energy emotions

positive_moderate.description: Textures with pleasant, flowing qualities that convey positive moderate-energy emotions

positive_low.description: Textures with smooth, calming qualities that convey positive low-energy emotions

high.description: Texture modifiers that create a sense of strength and control

low.description: Texture modifiers that create a sense of weakness or lack of control
